race.comment: SHE'S ASSORT (10) never let favourite backers drown on resumption with a dominant win over 1000m at Kembla Grange in fast time. Looks up to this despite drawing out and no surprise to see her take this out. ARE EE QUE (3) stalks the speed from the good gate third-up and no excuses today with Stapleford's 2kg claim. Shouldered the 59.5kg with a plugging fourth over 1100m at Gosford. Goes well over this track and trip and looks the main danger. MISSILE MAGNATE (6) is a promising type who resumes after racing in tougher company last prep. Given the two trials and look for him closing strongly if they overdo it up front. Each way. DEAR JEWEL (8) resumes with a good fresh record in easier company. Savaged the line strongly when second over 1100m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class last October. Returns with the two trials and must be kept safe.
